description.text: Kilogram Per Hour (kg/h) is a unit in the category of Mass flow rate. It is also known as kilogram/hour. Kilogram Per Hour (kg/h) has a dimension of MT-1 where $M$ is mass, and $T$ is time. It can be converted to the corresponding standard SI unit kg/s by multiplying its value by a factor of 0.000277777777778.
